instant.evidence: Scheduled batch draft worker (default 15-min interval); not a latency-bound interactive surface.

natural.evidence: Posts a natural-language 'proposed next step' (action, why, side-effects, needs-input) per ticket.

permitted.evidence: Disabled by default (OPS_AUTOPICKUP_ENABLED); per-project allowlist (config/autopickup_allowlist.json) carries approved_by/approved_at; draft-only mode never executes side effects; per-user OAuth token; per-bucket rate_limit_per_15m.

adaptive.evidence: Confidence calibration doctrine (>=0.85 / 0.5-0.85 / <0.5 clarifying question); reads recent comments and skips tickets it already drafted on so humans can react first.

contextual.evidence: Grounds each proposal in the BC todo description + recent comments + the local ops store (urgency-ranked AI-tier todos).

transparent.evidence: Per-todo audit JSONL with autopickup_id; the id is embedded in the comment; explicit side_effects disclosure; heartbeat.

governance.evidence: Off by default + per-project allowlist with recorded approver + draft-only mode + per-bucket rate limit + TOP_N cap.

observability.evidence: Per-scan + per-todo audit JSONL, heartbeat, and autopickup_id traceability from comment to log.

availability.evidence: Best-effort disk writes, per-user/per-todo error isolation, seen-set cap (5000) prevents unbounded growth.

lexicon.evidence: Standardized 'Auto-pickup: proposed next step' shape + autopickup_id; explicit no-em-dash output lexicon in the system prompt.

solid.evidence: Idempotent seen-set keyed on (todo_id, bc_updated_at); rate-limited; draft-only; confidence-gated; disabled by default.

layers.name: Intelligent Retrieval (RAG)
layers.how: Grounds proposals in BC todo + recent comments + local ops store.

layers.name: Agent-Aware Governance
layers.how: Disabled-by-default + approver allowlist + draft-only + rate limits.

layers.name: Multi-Agent Orchestration
layers.how: Runs under the My Day scheduler alongside the @CB responder.

notes: Phase 1 draft-only. agent_registry posture declared in config/tbi_runtime_agents.json (approval_required). Promotion to local-execute (Phase 2) requires re-attestation at a higher risk tier.
